risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) component was canceled and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Persistent High Political and Governance Risk
risk_summary: Political and governance risk remains rated as High across all reporting periods, indicating ongoing fragility in the operating environment that constrains project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]

risk_title: Severe Underperformance in Displaced Persons Integration
risk_summary: The project has achieved zero progress on its core objective of integrating displaced persons, with no Afghan passports processed in Pakistan and zero IDP/returnee households receiving employment support against targets of 1.5 million passports and 10,000 households.
evidence_quote: The Afghan missions in Pakistan has not been able to process machine readable passports yet, since required equipment has not been procured... Of which IDP/Returnee households [Actual Current]: 0.00 [End Target]: 10,000.00

risk_title: Inability to Deliver Civil Documentation Services to Refugee Population
risk_summary: Zero passports have been issued to Afghan refugees in Pakistan despite a target of 1.5 million, with equipment procurement failures preventing the Afghan missions from processing machine-readable passports.
evidence_quote: Number of passports issued to Afghan refugees in Pakistan during the project implementation period [Actual Current]: 0.00 [End Target]: 1,500,000.00... The Afghan missions in Pakistan has not been able to process machine readable passports yet, since required equipment has not been procured.

risk_summary: Stakeholder risk rating has escalated from Substantial at approval to High in current rating, indicating deteriorating relationships with government authorities, Gozar assemblies, and Business Gozar assemblies.
evidence_quote: Stakeholders [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]
